meaning: n.磺胺类药剂adj.磺胺基的,磺胺药剂的
examples: She was allergic to penicillin and sulfa drugs.
And similar to penicillin, many bacteria also have had a sulfa drug resistance.
In addition, the human use of other drugs also, such as sulfa drugs to kill bacteria.
Malaria-prevention drugs can affect HgA1C, as can the common sulfa antibiotics.
